hero.headline: Software for camper rental operations
hero.subheadline: CamperFlow connects your bookings to your operations — vehicle readiness, digital checklists, compliance tracking, and guest handovers — so nothing falls through the gap between booking confirmed and keys handed over.
hero.clarification: Not a booking platform. CamperFlow runs alongside your reservation system and handles everything it doesn't: the full operational layer from booking confirmed to vehicle returned.
hero.trust: Built by Kevin Marry — former operator of Epic Vans

problem.headline: Running a rental fleet is operationally complex
problem.intro: Booking systems handle reservations. But they don't track whether a vehicle is ready, compliant, or fit to hand over.
problem.item0Desc: Most operators still use spreadsheets to track vehicle readiness, compliance, and handover status — creating gaps, duplication, and missed checks.
problem.item1Desc: Vehicle status, open issues, and compliance records are scattered across emails, WhatsApp, notes, and multiple tools.
problem.item2Desc: Without a structured system, important checks get missed. Warranty conditions, roadworthiness, and regulatory requirements fall through the cracks.
problem.item3Desc: Handover processes are manual, inconsistent, and time-consuming — creating friction for guests and pressure on staff.

lifecycle.headline: From confirmed booking to road-ready
lifecycle.subheadline: CamperFlow orchestrates every stage of the rental cycle — with nothing falling through the cracks.
lifecycle.step0Desc: Booking arrives from your existing platform
lifecycle.step4Desc: Guest receives QR link to their trip guide
lifecycle.step6Desc: Return inspection complete, vehicle ready again

features.headline: One operational system for your entire fleet
features.subheadline: From the moment a booking is confirmed to the vehicle being returned and reset — CamperFlow runs the operational layer.
features.tab0Desc: See every upcoming rental in one view. Track which vehicles are assigned, their readiness status, and what actions need to happen before handover.
features.tab0Detail: Connect your existing booking platform and get a unified view of all upcoming reservations alongside vehicle readiness and open tasks.
features.tab1Desc: Every vehicle has a live readiness status. Know at a glance what's ready, what needs attention, and what's blocked before each rental starts.
features.tab1Detail: Track readiness across your entire fleet — from service schedules and compliance dates to open issues and pre-rental checks.
features.tab2Desc: Replace paper checklists with structured digital workflows for handover, return, and deep cleans. Every step is logged and timestamped.
features.tab2Detail: Build custom checklist templates for any workflow. Assign them to staff, track completion, and keep a full audit trail for every rental.
features.tab3Desc: Log and track vehicle defects, damage, and maintenance needs from the field. Link issues to rentals and monitor resolution.
features.tab3Detail: Staff can report issues on the spot. Every issue is tracked from discovery to resolution — linked to the vehicle, rental, and responsible person.
features.tab4Desc: Track service intervals, warranty conditions, roadworthiness certificates, and regulatory checks. Get alerts before deadlines — not after.
features.tab4Detail: Never miss a compliance deadline. CamperFlow monitors service intervals, safety certificates, and warranty conditions for every vehicle in your fleet.
features.tab5Desc: Every rental generates a branded guest page — vehicle guide, emergency contacts, return instructions — accessible via QR code. No app download. Multilingual.
features.tab5Detail: Guests scan a QR code before pickup and get everything they need for their trip. You control the content and branding. Supports multiple languages, updated in real time.

founder.headline: Built by someone who ran the operation
founder.body1: At Epic Vans, I managed the fleet day-to-day — vehicle prep, compliance deadlines, staff checklists, guest handovers. The booking system handled reservations. Everything else lived in spreadsheets, WhatsApp threads, and institutional memory.
founder.body2: CamperFlow is what I needed and couldn't find: not generic software with rental add-ons, but a system built specifically around how a rental operation actually works — from booking confirmed to vehicle returned.
founder.name: Kevin Marry
founder.role: Founder, CamperFlow — former operator of Epic Vans

pricing.headline: Simple, transparent pricing
pricing.subheadline: Start small, scale as your fleet grows. All plans include the full operational layer.

operations.heroHeadline: Know what needs attention today — before it becomes a problem at handover.
operations.heroSubheadline: CamperFlow gives you a live view of every upcoming rental: vehicle readiness, outstanding tasks, compliance blockers, and automated reminders — all in one place your team can act on.
operations.heroTrust: No need to replace your booking system. Staff can use any phone, tablet, or laptop.
operations.dashboardHeadline: Every vehicle, every booking, every open task. One view.
operations.dashboardBody: The operations dashboard is the control layer your booking system never built. Upcoming pickups, vehicle readiness, compliance deadlines, and outstanding actions — all surfaced in one view so nothing slips through before keys change hands.
operations.stat0Label: of fleet status visible in one view
operations.stat2Label: readiness and task status across all vehicles
operations.workflowHeadline: What needs to happen today — surfaced, not buried.
operations.workflowBody: CamperFlow tells your team what to do next. No digging through emails or WhatsApp threads — just the current status of every active and upcoming rental, with the actions that still need to happen before keys change hands.
operations.remindersDesc: Guests and staff are notified at every critical moment — pre-pickup confirmations, return reminders, and outstanding task alerts. No one has to remember to send them.
operations.readinessDesc: See the live readiness status of every vehicle in your fleet. Know what's prepped, what's pending, and what's blocked — before it becomes a problem at pickup.
operations.featuresHeadline: Reminders sent. Readiness tracked. Nothing missed.
operations.outcome0Desc: See every upcoming rental with vehicle status and outstanding actions — before it becomes a last-minute scramble at handover.
operations.outcome1Desc: Compliance gaps, unresolved issues, and vehicles not cleared for rental are flagged automatically — before they cause problems at pickup.
operations.outcome2Desc: Reminders go out automatically. Staff see what needs doing without being chased. The operational layer runs so you don't have to manage it manually.
operations.consistencyHeadline: The system runs the coordination so your team runs the operation.

checklists.heroHeadline: Every staff member follows the same process. Every time.
checklists.heroSubheadline: CamperFlow guides staff through pickup, return, and deep clean — with mandatory steps, photo capture, and timestamped sign-off. The process doesn't depend on who's working that day.
checklists.heroTrust: Works on any phone or tablet. No app download required.
checklists.proofHeadline: A guided process staff can't skip.
checklists.proofBody: Each booking automatically has pickup and return checklists assigned. Staff open CamperFlow on their phone and work through every step in order — required items, photos, notes. Nothing closes until everything is done.
checklists.stat0Label: of required steps enforced before sign-off
checklists.stat2Label: attached per step, linked to vehicle and booking
checklists.workflowHeadline: Each rental triggers its own checklist. Staff don't decide what to check.
checklists.workflowBody: Pickup and return checklists are attached to every booking. When a staff member opens a booking, the checklist is already there. The same structured process runs for every vehicle and every handover — regardless of who's working.
checklists.evidenceHeadline: Every inspection leaves a permanent record.
checklists.evidenceBody: Photos, notes, and completion status are stored against the vehicle and booking — not in someone's camera roll or a paper file. If a damage dispute arises after return, the timestamped evidence is already on record.
checklists.evidenceCard0Desc: Faults, defects, and damage reported on the spot — linked to the vehicle, the rental, and the staff member who logged it. Timestamped and permanently stored.
checklists.evidenceCard1Desc: When a checklist is signed off, the vehicle status updates automatically — showing exactly which checks passed, what was flagged, and whether it cleared for the next rental.
checklists.consistencyHeadline: The same process runs for every vehicle, every handover.
checklists.item0Desc: You build the checklist once. Every staff member follows that exact template — on every vehicle, for every rental. No one improvises or abbreviates.
checklists.item1Desc: Mark a step as mandatory and staff must complete it before the checklist closes. No workarounds, no unchecked boxes, no assumptions.
checklists.item2Desc: Every completed checklist is permanently stored — who did it, when, what was checked, what was flagged. Reviewable at any point, linked to the vehicle and booking.
checklists.step0Desc: When a booking is confirmed, pickup and return checklists are automatically assigned to the vehicle. Staff open CamperFlow and see exactly what needs checking — no verbal handoff, no guessing.
checklists.step1Desc: Check off items in order, attach photos from the camera, add notes. Required steps can't be skipped — every item is acknowledged before the checklist can be completed.
checklists.step2Desc: On completion, the checklist is signed off and locked — timestamped, linked to the vehicle, booking, and staff member. Reviewable any time. If a dispute arises, the evidence is already there.

cta.headline: See CamperFlow in action
cta.body: Book a 30-minute demo. We'll walk through your fleet, your current process, and show you exactly how CamperFlow fits your operation.
cta.note: No commitment. No pitch deck. Just a real look at the product.

featuresPage.heroHeadline: Every operational tool your fleet needs, built in.
featuresPage.heroSubheadline: CamperFlow covers the full rental operation — vehicle readiness, digital checklists, compliance tracking, guest handovers, reminders, and more. Not a booking platform. A system built specifically for how rental operations work.
featuresPage.heroTrust: Works alongside your existing reservation system. No data migration required.
featuresPage.group0Headline: The operational layer your booking system never built.
featuresPage.cap0Desc: A live view of every upcoming rental: vehicle readiness, outstanding tasks, compliance blockers, and staff actions — all in one place your team can act on before handover.
featuresPage.cap1Desc: Guided pickup, return, and vehicle prep workflows. Mandatory steps enforced. Photos attached per step. Every checklist timestamped and permanently stored against the booking.
featuresPage.cap2Desc: Live readiness status for every vehicle in your fleet. Know what's cleared, what's pending, and what needs attention before keys change hands.
featuresPage.cap3Desc: Each booking generates a clean guest portal with pickup details, vehicle guide, emergency contacts, and return instructions. Accessible via QR code or direct link. No app download.
featuresPage.cap4Desc: Pre-pickup confirmations, return reminders, and staff task alerts sent automatically at the right moment. No one on your team has to remember to trigger them.
featuresPage.cap5Desc: Track service intervals, roadworthiness certificates, warranty conditions, and regulatory deadlines per vehicle. Alerts surface before expiry — not after something fails at handover.
featuresPage.cap6Desc: Staff log damage and defects from the field, linked to the vehicle and the rental. Every issue tracked from discovery to resolution — with a timestamped audit trail.

featuresPage.cap7Desc: Connect your existing reservation platform and bookings flow in automatically. Checklists, readiness checks, and reminders attach without manual re-entry.
featuresPage.cap8Desc: Every action logged: who ran which checklist, who flagged which issue, who signed off at handover. A full audit trail tied to every vehicle and rental.
featuresPage.cap9Desc: Collect structured post-rental feedback from guests. Track satisfaction over time and surface recurring issues before they become a pattern.
featuresPage.evidenceHeadline: What the system looks like in use.
featuresPage.evidence0Desc: Upcoming rentals, vehicle readiness, and open tasks in one view. Your team knows what needs doing before the morning rush.
featuresPage.evidence1Desc: Every pickup and return guided step by step. Mandatory items can't be bypassed. Photo evidence attached per step.
featuresPage.evidence2Desc: Service dates, expiry certificates, and warranty conditions per vehicle. Alerts before anything lapses.

pricingPage.heroSubheadline: Start small. Scale within your plan. Upgrade when you're ready. Every plan includes the full operational layer — no feature tiers.
pricingPage.plansSubheadline: Every plan includes unlimited bookings, digital checklists, automated reminders, and guest portal access.
pricingPage.setupHeadline: Up and running in days, not months.
pricingPage.setupSubheadline: We work through setup with you — not a generic onboarding flow.
pricingPage.setup0Desc: A dedicated setup session. We build your fleet structure, checklists, and workflows together. You don't start from a blank slate.
pricingPage.setup1Desc: CamperFlow connects to your existing reservation platform. No migration, no disruption, no need to switch anything.
pricingPage.setup2Title: Your team is operational in days
pricingPage.setup2Desc: Staff access CamperFlow from any phone, tablet, or laptop. No app download. No IT project. No training week.
pricingPage.setup3Desc: Month-to-month billing. Cancel anytime. No exit fees, no locked-in contracts.
pricingPage.faq0Q: Does CamperFlow replace my booking platform?
pricingPage.faq0A: No. CamperFlow is the operational layer that runs alongside your existing reservation system. It handles vehicle readiness, checklists, compliance tracking, and guest handovers — everything your booking platform doesn't. You keep your reservation system as-is.
pricingPage.faq1Q: Can I add vehicles without upgrading my plan?
pricingPage.faq1A: No. Each plan includes a fixed number of vehicles. When you need more, upgrade to the next tier — it takes a few clicks with no data loss or configuration reset.
pricingPage.faq2Q: What happens when I hit my plan's vehicle limit?
pricingPage.faq2A: You upgrade to the next plan. It takes a few clicks — no data loss, no configuration reset. Your fleet history, checklists, and staff accounts all carry over automatically.
pricingPage.faq3A: Most operators are fully operational within a few days. We run a dedicated setup session with you — your fleet, your checklists, your workflows. You're not left with generic templates to figure out alone.
pricingPage.faq4A: No. CamperFlow is billed month-to-month. Cancel anytime, no questions asked. We keep customers by being useful, not by locking them in.
pricingPage.faq5Q: Can I change my plan later?
pricingPage.faq5A: Yes. Upgrade or downgrade at any time. Changes take effect immediately — no waiting for renewal periods, no re-setup required.

faqPage.heroSubheadline: Common questions from operators before they get started — grouped by what matters most.
faqPage.heroTrust: Not finding what you need? Email us at info@camperflow.io
faqPage.g0a0: Most operators are fully operational within a few days. We run a dedicated setup session — your fleet, your checklists, your workflows — so you're not left figuring out a blank-slate tool on your own.
faqPage.g0q1: Do you help with setup, or is it self-serve?
faqPage.g0a1: We help. Setup is a guided session with the CamperFlow team. We build your fleet structure, checklist templates, and staff access together — not an automated onboarding wizard you work through alone.
faqPage.g0q2: What do I need to have ready before setup?
faqPage.g0a2: Your vehicle list, staff accounts, and access to your booking platform. We handle configuration during the setup session.
faqPage.g1Headline: CamperFlow runs alongside your current setup.
faqPage.g1q0: Does CamperFlow replace my booking platform?
faqPage.g1a0: No. CamperFlow is the operational layer that runs alongside your existing reservation system — whether that's Checkfront, Rentman, Wheelbase, or something else. It handles vehicle readiness, checklists, compliance, and guest handovers — everything your booking platform doesn't. Your reservation system stays as-is.
faqPage.g1q1: Can I bring my existing bookings across?
faqPage.g1a1: Yes. Connect your booking platform and upcoming reservations import automatically — with vehicle assignments, checklist triggers, and reminders attached. No manual re-entry.
faqPage.g2Headline: Works on any device. No app download.
faqPage.g2q0: How do staff use CamperFlow at handover?
faqPage.g2a0: Staff open CamperFlow on any phone, tablet, or laptop — no app download, no account for the guest. They find the booking, open the assigned checklist, and work through it step by step: items checked off, photos attached where needed. It takes as long as the handover itself, not extra.
faqPage.g2q1: Do staff need to download an app?
faqPage.g2a1: No. CamperFlow runs in any browser. Staff open it on their phone, complete their checklist, and move on. Nothing to install, no accounts for guests.
faqPage.g2q2: How long does it take to train staff?
faqPage.g2a2: 15–20 minutes for most staff. The interface is designed for field use, not office software. A quick walkthrough before their first shift is usually enough.
faqPage.g2a3: Each booking generates a clean portal with pickup details, vehicle guide, emergency contacts, and return instructions — accessible via QR code or direct link. No app download, no account required. Content populates automatically from the booking.
faqPage.g2a4: Yes. Pre-pickup confirmations, return reminders, and staff task alerts go out automatically at the right moments. Nothing needs to be manually triggered.
faqPage.g3Headline: Track what matters. Stay ahead of deadlines.
faqPage.g3a0: Any date-based item you configure per vehicle — service intervals, roadworthiness certificates, MOT/TÜV, warranty deadlines, fire extinguisher checks, and any custom items specific to your fleet. You set the deadlines; CamperFlow alerts before they expire.
faqPage.g3a1: You do. Fleet records, checklist history, guest data, and booking information all belong to you. CamperFlow doesn't sell or share it.
faqPage.g3q2: What happens to my data if I cancel?
faqPage.g3a2: You can export your checklist records, vehicle history, and booking data before cancelling. Nothing is deleted without notice.
faqPage.g4a0: The full operational system — unlimited bookings, digital checklists, automated reminders, compliance tracking, guest portal access, and staff accountability. No feature tiers. The difference between plans is vehicle and staff capacity.
faqPage.g4q1: What happens when I reach my vehicle limit?
faqPage.g4a1: You upgrade to the next plan. It takes a few clicks — no data loss, no configuration reset. Your fleet history, checklists, and staff accounts all carry over automatically.
faqPage.g4a2: No. Month-to-month billing. Cancel anytime, no questions asked, no exit fees.
faqPage.g4a3: Yes — upgrade or downgrade at any time. Changes take effect immediately. Your data, checklists, and staff accounts carry over automatically.

guestExperience.heroHeadline: Every guest arrives knowing exactly what to expect.
guestExperience.heroSubheadline: CamperFlow gives each guest a clean, organised portal — pickup details, vehicle guide, emergency contacts, and return instructions — before they ever step foot near the vehicle.
guestExperience.heroTrust: No app download. Guests access everything via QR code or direct link.
guestExperience.portalHeadline: Guests know what they're collecting, when, and where.
guestExperience.portalBody: When a booking is confirmed, your guest automatically receives a link to their trip information — collection time, vehicle details, what to bring, and who to call. No back-and-forth emails. No 'where do I go?' messages on the morning of pickup.
guestExperience.workflowHeadline: A professional experience at every stage of the rental.
guestExperience.workflowBody: CamperFlow creates a branded guest portal for every rental. Guests open it before pickup, use it during their trip, and return to it for drop-off instructions. Everything in one place — not scattered across email threads and WhatsApp messages.
guestExperience.stat0Label: for everything the guest needs throughout their rental
guestExperience.stat1Label: phone calls asking 'where do I go?' on pickup day
guestExperience.stat2Label: reminders sent before pickup and before return
guestExperience.step0Desc: The moment a booking is confirmed, a personalised guest portal is generated. Pickup time, vehicle, location, and everything else the guest needs — already in their inbox.
guestExperience.step1Desc: Your guest opens their portal before the trip. Vehicle guide, what to check, emergency contacts. They know what they're picking up and what to expect — before they arrive.
guestExperience.step2Desc: Before the rental ends, your guest receives a return reminder with drop-off instructions. No chasing, no confusion about the process.
guestExperience.portalDesc: A clean, professional page containing everything the guest needs for their rental — pickup details, vehicle guide, emergency contacts, and return instructions. Accessible via QR code or direct link.
guestExperience.remindersDesc: Pre-pickup confirmations, return reminders, and important trip information are sent automatically — at the right moment, without anyone on your team having to remember.
guestExperience.outcome0Desc: Guests receive collection time, vehicle details, and location before they ask — eliminating the day-of-pickup messages that interrupt your handover process.
guestExperience.outcome1Desc: Vehicle guide, emergency contacts, return instructions — all on a single page your guest can return to throughout the rental. Not buried in an email chain.
guestExperience.outcome2Title: Reminders and follow-up without manual work
guestExperience.outcome2Desc: Confirmation, pre-pickup reminder, and return instructions go out automatically. Your guest is handled — without your team needing to chase or remember.
guestExperience.consistencyHeadline: Every guest gets the same professional experience — automatically.

aboutPage.heroHeadline: We built this from inside a rental operation.
aboutPage.heroSubheadline: CamperFlow came from a real operational problem — not a product hypothesis. The frustrations that built it are the same ones your team faces every time a handover goes sideways.
aboutPage.originHeadline: Running a fleet taught us what booking systems miss.
aboutPage.originBody1: Before CamperFlow, Kevin Marry ran Epic Vans — a campervan rental operation. The booking system handled reservations fine. But the operational side — vehicle readiness, compliance deadlines, staff checklists, handover records — lived in spreadsheets, WhatsApp threads, and institutional memory.
aboutPage.originBody2: Every morning started with the same questions: which vehicles are actually ready? Which checks are done? What's still pending before the next pickup? The answers were scattered across tools and people. The only way to know was to ask around.
aboutPage.originBody3: CamperFlow is the tool that should have existed. Not a generic platform with rental add-ons bolted on — a system built specifically around how a rental operation actually works, from booking confirmed to vehicle returned.
aboutPage.founderRole: Founder, CamperFlow — former operator of Epic Vans
aboutPage.founderQuote: I built the tool I needed and couldn't find anywhere else. Not imagined problems — the exact friction points that made running a rental fleet harder than it needed to be.
aboutPage.gapBody: Booking platforms are excellent at what they do: taking reservations, processing payments, managing availability. But they stop at confirmation. They don't know if the vehicle is ready, which compliance dates are expiring, or what state it came back in after the last rental.
aboutPage.gap0Desc: Booking confirmed doesn't mean vehicle ready. Prep work, open issues, and compliance gaps don't appear in your reservation system — and they don't resolve themselves.
aboutPage.gap1Desc: Who checked what, when, and what they found — this doesn't live in your booking platform. When something goes wrong, there's no record to look back on.
aboutPage.gap2Desc: Service intervals, roadworthiness certificates, warranty conditions — these run on their own deadlines, independent of bookings. Until something expires. Then they become urgent.
aboutPage.philosophyHeadline: Operational discipline isn't optional in a rental business.
aboutPage.philosophyBody1: In a rental operation, consistency isn't a nice-to-have — it's what keeps a damage dispute from becoming a lengthy argument, what ensures a vehicle is always in the condition it was rented out in, and what gives staff a clear process to follow regardless of how experienced they are.
aboutPage.philosophyBody2: CamperFlow is built around a simple idea: every step of the rental cycle — prep, handover, return — should be structured, logged, and accountable. Not to create bureaucracy, but because unstructured operations create real-world risk.
aboutPage.philosophyQuote: The checklist exists so the experienced staff member doesn't have to rely on memory, and the new hire doesn't have to guess.
aboutPage.positionHeadline: Works alongside your current booking system. Doesn't replace it.
aboutPage.positionBody: CamperFlow isn't a reservation platform. It's the operational layer that runs alongside one — whichever you're already using. Bookings flow in from your existing system; CamperFlow handles everything from that point: vehicle readiness, staff checklists, compliance tracking, guest portals, and the full handover record.
aboutPage.positionNote: Works with Checkfront, Rentman, Wheelbase, and others.
aboutPage.position0Desc: Your existing reservations connect directly. No data export, no parallel running period, no disruption to how you take bookings.
aboutPage.position1Desc: Any phone, tablet, or laptop. No app download. A quick setup session and your team is using it on their next shift.
aboutPage.position2Desc: CamperFlow adds structure to your operation without dictating how you run it. Configure checklists, compliance items, and workflows around how your fleet actually works.
